Name: LEVELUP_STATUS_CALC_PARAM
Description: Defines how character attributes and derived combat statistics scale when leveling up.

Fields.Name: Maximum HP
Fields.Description: Determines the character's maximum health value and healing capacity.

Fields.Name: Maximum Stamina
Fields.Description: Determines the maximum stamina available for actions such as attacking, dodging, and blocking.

Fields.Name: Maximum Equip Load
Fields.Description: Defines the maximum equipment weight the character can carry before movement penalties occur.

Fields.Name: Spell Slot Count
Fields.Description: Determines the number of available spell attunement or memory slots.

Fields.Name: Spell Casting Speed
Fields.Description: Controls how quickly spells and incantations can be cast.

Fields.Name: Physical Attack Power from Strength
Fields.Description: Physical attack scaling contribution gained from the Strength attribute.

Fields.Name: Physical Attack Power from Dexterity
Fields.Description: Physical attack scaling contribution gained from the Dexterity attribute.

Fields.Name: Magic Attack Power
Fields.Description: Determines the effectiveness of magic-based attacks.

Fields.Name: Fire Attack Power
Fields.Description: Determines the effectiveness of fire-element attacks.

Fields.Name: Lightning Attack Power
Fields.Description: Determines the effectiveness of lightning-element attacks.

Fields.Name: Dark Attack Power
Fields.Description: Determines the effectiveness of dark-element attacks.

Fields.Name: Poison Attack Power
Fields.Description: Determines the buildup or effectiveness of poison-inflicting attacks.

Fields.Name: Bleed Attack Power
Fields.Description: Determines the buildup or effectiveness of bleed-inflicting attacks.

Fields.Name: Defense
Fields.Description: General defensive value that reduces incoming physical damage.

Fields.Name: Magic Resistance
Fields.Description: Reduces damage taken from magic attacks.

Fields.Name: Fire Resistance
Fields.Description: Reduces damage taken from fire attacks.

Fields.Name: Lightning Resistance
Fields.Description: Reduces damage taken from lightning attacks.

Fields.Name: Dark Resistance
Fields.Description: Reduces damage taken from dark-element attacks.

Fields.Name: Poison Resistance
Fields.Description: Increases resistance against poison status buildup.

Fields.Name: Bleed Resistance
Fields.Description: Increases resistance against bleed status buildup.

Fields.Name: Petrification Resistance
Fields.Description: Increases resistance against petrification effects.

Fields.Name: Curse Resistance
Fields.Description: Increases resistance against curse effects.

Fields.Name: Agility
Fields.Description: Affects animation responsiveness, evasive actions, or general movement speed.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: Determines resistance to stagger and interruption during attacks.

Fields.Name: Primary Left-Hand Weapon
Fields.Description: Stat contribution or slot modifier for the first left-hand weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Secondary Left-Hand Weapon
Fields.Description: Stat contribution or slot modifier for the second left-hand weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Third Left-Hand Weapon
Fields.Description: Stat contribution or slot modifier for the third left-hand weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Primary Right-Hand Weapon
Fields.Description: Stat contribution or slot modifier for the first right-hand weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Secondary Right-Hand Weapon
Fields.Description: Stat contribution or slot modifier for the second right-hand weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Third Right-Hand Weapon
Fields.Description: Stat contribution or slot modifier for the third right-hand weapon slot.

Fields.Name: Strike Defense
Fields.Description: Reduces damage taken from strike or blunt attacks.

Fields.Name: Slash Defense
Fields.Description: Reduces damage taken from slashing attacks.

Fields.Name: Thrust Defense
Fields.Description: Reduces damage taken from thrusting or piercing attacks.

Fields.Name: Poise Defense
Fields.Description: Improves resistance against stagger and knockback effects.
